venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menus of contemporary and classic dishes; complimentary caviar available on request at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant on Deck 8 aft. Buffet with live cooking stations for breakfast and lunch; regionally themed à la carte dinner service each evening. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio Grill
venues.description: Deck 8 poolside venue serving casual lunch — salads, burgers, grilled seafood, and daily specials under shaded outdoor seating. Complimentary.

venues.name: Earth & Ocean at The Patio
venues.description: The Patio transforms at sunset into a candlelit à la carte dinner restaurant. Eclectic world flavors by consulting Chef Anton Egger; menu celebrates global ingredients in an open-air setting. Reservations recommended. Complimentary.

venues.name: Solis
venues.description: Seabourn's signature specialty restaurant, replacing The Grill by Thomas Keller in 2024. Mediterranean-inspired cuisine by Master Chef Anton Egger and Senior Corporate Chef Franck Salein — light, colorful, handcrafted dishes showcasing fresh ingredients. Dinner only; reservations required (one booking per guest per 7-day voyage). Complimentary.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub on Deck 7. Freshly roasted specialty coffees, handmade gelato (chefs trained at Italy's Gelato University), pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu served course-by-course during dinner hours; dedicated breakfast, lunch, and snack menus throughout the day.
